description: Dashboard de performance para testes K6 com InfluxDB

targets.query: SELECT percentile("value", 95) FROM "http_req_duration" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT percentile("value", 99) FROM "http_req_duration" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT mean("value") FROM "http_req_failed" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT mean("value") FROM "http_reqs" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT max("value") FROM "vus" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT sum("value") FROM "http_reqs" WHERE $timeFilter

panels.title: Requisições por Segundo (RPS) vs Usuários Virtuais

targets.query: SELECT mean("value") FROM "http_reqs" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT mean("value") FROM "vus" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)

panels.title: ⏱ Latência — Percentis ao Longo do Tempo
Distribuição de Latência HTTP (p50 / p90 / p95 / p99)

targets.query: SELECT percentile("value", 50) FROM "http_req_duration" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT percentile("value", 90) FROM "http_req_duration" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT percentile("value", 95) FROM "http_req_duration" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT percentile("value", 99) FROM "http_req_duration" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)

panels.title: Taxa de Erros HTTP ao Longo do Tempo

SELECT percentile("value", 95) FROM "http_req_duration" WHERE "endpoint" = 'criar_post' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)

panels.title: Composição da Latência: Conexão + TLS + Espera + Recebimento

targets.query: SELECT mean("value") FROM "http_req_duration" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT mean("value") FROM "http_req_waiting" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT mean("value") FROM "http_req_connecting" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
